# coderabbit-yaml-valid

.coderabbit.yaml must be valid YAML

| | |
|---|---|
| **Severity** | error (auto) |
| **Autofix** | - |
| **Since** | v0.1.0 |
| **Repo Types** | coderabbit |
| **Category** | [CodeRabbit](coderabbit.md) |

## Configuration

```yaml
rules:
  coderabbit-yaml-valid:
    enabled: auto  # true | false | auto
    severity: error
```


*Run `skillsaw explain coderabbit-yaml-valid` to see this documentation and the rule's effective configuration in your terminal.*
